sidebar.title: Admin Desk
sidebar.open_editor_desc: Jump into the map editing tool
sidebar.access_model_desc: Admin controls the dashboard. Editor keeps map editing access through /editor.

header.title: Admin Dashboard
header.description: Control access, inspect the current network state, and route into the editor without mixing operational UI into the map workspace.

overview.routes_hint: Current transit lines available in the live snapshot.
overview.stops_hint: Editable stop points currently stored in the shuttle snapshot.
overview.roles_hint: Authorization roles loaded from Better Auth + Prisma.
overview.last_update_hint: Latest write time across the current JSON-backed data files.
overview.quick_actions_title: Jump straight into the live editing surfaces
overview.quick_actions_desc: The dashboard stays operational and summary-first. Editing still happens inside the full-screen editor.
overview.route_editor_desc: Open the route geometry workspace with the route tab selected.
overview.stops_editor_desc: Jump directly into stop placement, drag, and naming controls.
overview.mask_editor_desc: Open the service area mask workflow without switching tabs manually.
overview.export_snapshot_desc: Download the current shuttle and campus JSON payload as a single admin snapshot.
overview.system_status_desc: Overview-level status until deeper admin pages and audit history land.
overview.authentication_desc: Better Auth secret and session handling are configured for protected surfaces.
overview.editor_guard_desc: `/editor` and save APIs are behind role-aware server checks.
overview.database_desc: Role metrics are read from Prisma-backed auth tables.
overview.recent_snapshot_desc: These files still back the live map state until the full data migration moves editor content into the database.
overview.notes_desc: A concise state summary that ties the overview to the deeper admin surfaces.
overview.storage_mode_desc: Live edits are still persisted to JSON files. The dashboard deliberately surfaces that so data-layer work does not get hidden.
overview.mask_geometry_desc: The current campus/service area polygon contains {count} points in the live config snapshot.
overview.next_surface_desc: Use `/admin/network`, `/admin/access`, and `/admin/activity` as the detailed read-only surfaces before dropping into `/editor`.

network.route_summary_hint: {count} coordinates across all route directions in the live snapshot.
network.stops_summary_hint: {count} stops already have names assigned in the current editor payload.
network.action_rail_desc: The network page stays read-only and descriptive. Editing still routes back into the full-screen editor.
network.route_geometry_desc: Adjust direction coordinates and path layout.
network.stop_placement_desc: Reorder, rename, and move stop markers.
network.service_area_mask_desc: Refine the campus boundary polygon used by the live map.
network.network_anatomy_desc: A compact breakdown of what is currently stored in the route, stop, and mask snapshots.

access.total_users_hint: All Better Auth users currently visible to the dashboard.
access.admin_users_hint: Accounts that can enter admin-only routes.
access.editor_users_hint: Accounts that can access the editor surface.
access.active_sessions_hint: Currently non-expired sessions across all visible users.
access.active_sessions_hint_no_db: Database unavailable while loading access metrics.
access.role_ledger_desc: Read-only role inventory from the Prisma-backed auth tables.
access.no_roles: No role records are available yet.
access.user_access_matrix_title: Who can access admin and editor surfaces
access.user_access_matrix_desc: This page stays intentionally read-only in the first pass. It is for verification, not role editing.
access.no_users: No users were returned from the auth tables.

activity.recent_actions_hint: Derived events from snapshots, sessions, users, and role assignments.
activity.writable_assets_hint: Files that still back the live map state before the future data migration.
activity.active_sessions_hint: Non-expired sessions visible from Better Auth session records.
activity.recent_users_hint: Most recent user records included in the derived event feed.
activity.timeline_desc: This feed is intentionally derived, not a permanent audit table. It gives the admin desk a useful signal surface until audit logging lands.
activity.no_events: No derived events are available yet.
activity.known_state_desc: This panel makes the current operational assumptions explicit so later audit work has a clear baseline.
activity.authentication_desc: Better Auth is responsible for protected-session handling across admin and editor surfaces.
activity.editor_protection_desc: Access to `/editor` and `POST /api/editor/save` remains server-guarded by role checks.
activity.storage_mode_desc: Runtime edits are still JSON-backed. The admin desk surfaces this explicitly until data migration moves canonical map content into the database.
activity.future_audit_desc: This layout is reserved to accept a persistent audit trail later. The current feed is derived to keep the structure stable without pretending there is already immutable history.
activity.writable_runtime_desc: Derived file-level status for the current save surface.
activity.database_availability_desc: Prisma-backed auth data is used to enrich the derived activity feed with sessions, users, and role assignments.
